To take your breath away

~ Essence of ~

Every fragrance


Who We Are

Karnataka Aromas has been the leading fragrance & flavour entity in India for over two decades. Trusted and renowned, Karnataka Aromas has earned a genuine reputation for offering luxurious, crafted and world-class ingredients for fragrance and flavours.

Read more.
Discover

Karnataka Aromas

Infrastructure

Karnataka Aromas own a 45000 square feet warehousing facility, located centrally with-in the Bengaluru city limits. This not only makes the local dispatches easy, but also ensures quick access to all out-station bookings and prompt dispatch of orders.


Read More

Quality

With state-of the-art resources, expertise and a unique global network amongst the finest quality aroma ingredients has given us confidence to deliver the best-in-class range of products to our clientele.



Read More
Testimonials

“We find Karnataka Aromas easily approachable excellent in customer service and competitive in prices. They also stock in bond and otherwise a big variety of aroma materials and their deliveries have been quick.”

Mr. T S Gulati
Group Chairman
Sonarome Group of Companies

“ Karnataka Aromas is good at honouring long term contracts and quality conscious. We rarely face delays while procuring material from them and they are also good at documentation. We prefer to work with such vendors who are quite open and transparent in transaction.”

Mr. Hariharakrishnan K S
Director – Supply Chain, Scent & Care
Symrise Pvt Ltd, Chennai

“Karnataka Aromas extends excellent service to agarbathi industry by offering aromatic chemical and natural essential oils at competitive prices. They are really helping the industry by their decent profiles. We rely on this firm for
genuine products.”

Mr. Ramesh Karupakala
Partner
Sri Vijayalakshmi Agarbathi Works

“Karnataka Aromas has always adhered to their supply schedules delivered materials with the required quality and all along maintaining a pleasant business relationship. It is pleasure to deal with people who knows the meaning of efficiency”

Mr. Jagdish Vaidya
Director
Robertet Goldfield (India) Pvt. Ltd.

“Karnataka Aromas a fast growing company with high business etiquette and having excellent people to deal with. I see a great potential.”

Mr. Sant Sanganeria
Founder Chairman & MD
Ultra International Limited, New Delhi
